title: Wibmon! Official Modpack
description: A cobblemon modpack, specially made for the Wibmon server.
body:
# Wibmon's Official Modpack!

## What does this modpack do?
This modpack is aimed to add loads of mods that make the cobblemon experience a fun one! It is built ontop of the official cobblemon modpack, and adds a bunch of addons for even more content, and Terralith for the beautiful biomes.

## Why should you download?
This modpack is specifically aimed towards the Wibmon server, and by downloading this modpack you can instantly take part of an amazing community on a fun server with lots of content.


**The server ip will automatically be included in the server list when installed, join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/nKXXfKR9Dq) for more info.**
